pattern: Partition an array into single-digit and double-digit groups, then compare sums to determine the winner.
hints: Split nums into two groups: those less than 10 (single-digit) and those >= 10 (double-digit).
Alice wins if either group's sum strictly exceeds the total sum of the other group.
Since the total is fixed, Alice wins iff single_sum > double_sum OR double_sum > single_sum, which simplifies to single_sum != double_sum.

edge_inputs.description: All single-digit numbers — double group is empty (sum 0)
All double-digit numbers — single group is empty (sum 0)
Both groups have equal sum — Alice cannot win
Maximum length array with single and double digits balanced

stress.description: Random array of 1..99 integers, length up to 100
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 99) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
